user.title: BMW CarData
user.description: Enter the BMW CarData client ID you created in the BMW portal. This integration uses the official read-only BMW CarData API.

authorize.title: Approve BMW Device
authorize.description: Open {verification_url} in your browser, enter the code {user_code}, approve the BMW device, then return here and submit again.

select_vehicle.title: Select Vehicle
select_vehicle.description: Choose which mapped BMW vehicle this entry should represent.

reauth_confirm.title: Reconnect BMW CarData
reauth_confirm.description: BMW needs you to complete the device authorization flow again for this integration entry.

error.authorization_pending: Approve the BMW device code in the browser, then submit again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the BMW CarData API.
error.invalid_auth: BMW rejected the credentials or device authorization.
error.rate_limited: BMW rate limit reached. Try again later.

abort.already_configured: This BMW vehicle is already configured.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not complete the BMW setup flow.
